speaker: seller

args.message: Fuel-sipping reliability at its finest! This 2018 Prius Two averages over 50 MPG and comes with Toyota's legendary hybrid drivetrain. Well-maintained with a clean history — perfect for commuters looking to save at the pump.

text: Fuel-sipping reliability at its finest! This 2018 Prius Two averages over 50 MPG and comes with Toyota's legendary hybrid drivetrain. Well-maintained with a clean history — perfect for commuters looking to save at the pump.

speaker: buyer

args.message: 50 MPG? That's optimistic, even for a Prius. What kind of real-world mileage have you been seeing, and how was that number calculated? Also, you mention 'well-maintained' and 'clean history' — can you tell me about the maintenance records, specifically any major services done, and confirm there have been no accidents or flood damage?

text: 50 MPG? That's optimistic, even for a Prius. What kind of real-world mileage have you been seeing, and how was that number calculated? args.message: That 50 MPG figure is based on EPA estimates, which are generally quite accurate for this model. As for maintenance, this Prius has been diligently serviced. We have records showing regular oil changes and routine check-ups. It's got a clean title and no reported accidents or flood damage. The previous owner really took good care of it.

text: That 50 MPG figure is based on EPA estimates, which are generally quite accurate for this model. As for maintenance, this Prius has been diligently serviced. speaker: buyer

args.message: "Generally quite accurate" isn't what I asked. I want to know what *you've* seen. And "routine check-ups" is pretty vague. Any records of hybrid battery health checks, brake service, or transmission fluid changes? A clean title means no salvage or rebuilt brands, but it doesn't speak to the quality of repairs after an accident. How can you confirm there have been no accidents?
